description_long: This object is a classic double-barrel shotgun with a side-by-side barrel configuration, featuring a long, blued steel barrel assembly and a polished wooden full stock. The barrels are parallel and of equal length, with a smooth, uninterrupted rib running along the top. The receiver is metallic and connects the barrels to the stock, with visible dual triggers and a rounded, metallic trigger guard. The stock is dark wood, smoothly contoured for shoulder support, and the fore-end is also wooden, matching the stock. The overall design is traditional, with no visible modern attachments or embellishments, and the finish is sleek and well-maintained.
description: A traditional side-by-side double-barrel shotgun with a polished wooden stock and long, blued steel barrels. The design is classic and streamlined, with dual triggers and a rounded metallic trigger guard.
description_view_0: Side profile showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the double barrels, wooden stock, and metallic receiver.
description_view_1: Front view down the barrels, emphasizing the side-by-side configuration and the narrow profile of the barrels.
description_view_2: Opposite side profile, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock, barrels, and receiver.
description_view_3: Rear view from the stock end, showing the width of the stock and the alignment of the barrels.
attribute_barrel_configuration: side-by-side double-barrel, equal length, smooth rib on top
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized metallic guard with smooth edges and no visible finger grooves
